entrypoint_contract.rule: This autonomous runner samples one fresh dashboard_chat live window through the public dashboard API. It proves only the sampled dashboard entrypoint/window and must not be auto-promoted to telegram, cross-entry Stage 1 pass, runtime efficacy, or consciousness-like claims.

policy_contract.single_session_rule: Each run uses exactly one new dedicated dashboard session and never reuses dashboard:test:default.
policy_contract.note: Even repeated clean dashboard runs remain single-entry strengthened evidence and do not by themselves close Stage 1.
